tdd_evidence.red_evidence: First `npm run typecheck` after adding tests/openreport.test.ts: tsc reported 3x TS2339 'Property openReport does not exist on type Engine' at lines 26, 52, 53 of openreport.test.ts. Property absent from Engine class before the index.ts edit.
tdd_evidence.green_evidence: npm test (which runs build:native:debug + tsc + node --test): 36 passed, 0 failed. New openreport.test.ts contributes 3 cases (spec-locked fields, idempotency, Engine.open Promise signature unchanged). Full prior TS suite (33 cases) still green.

implementation_notes.shape_d_rationale: Mirrors py-slice Shape D verbatim. Engine.open keeps its 0.6.0 signature (Promise<Engine>); the OpenReport is stashed on the napi Engine struct at open time (Arc<RustOpenReport>) and converted to the napi-rs object shape on each accessor call. engine.openReport() is sync — no Promise hop — because the data already lives in the binding-side struct after open. Sibling semantics to engine.counters().
implementation_notes.openreport_type_choice: #[napi(object)] for OpenReport, MigrationStepReport, EmbedderIdentity — matches existing CounterSnapshot / SearchResult / WriteReceipt precedent in fathomdb-napi (Phase 11b idiom). #[napi(object)] returns a plain JS object literal with camelCase fields auto-derived from Rust snake_case (e.g. schema_version_before → schemaVersionBefore), which is exactly the spec-locked camelCase shape per dev/interfaces/typescript.md. Avoids the class boilerplate / instanceof semantics that #[napi] struct exposure would introduce — accessor returns a value, not a handle.
implementation_notes.idempotency_mechanism: OpenReport is captured once at Engine::open into Engine.open_report: Arc<RustOpenReport>. open_report() does Arc::clone (cheap) and then OpenReport::from_rust deep-converts to the napi-object shape on each call. No re-probe, no live state. Repeat calls produce structurally identical JS objects (asserted in idempotency_test).
implementation_notes.duration_ms_signedness_note: Native fathomdb_schema::MigrationStepReport.duration_ms is Option<u64>; napi-rs has no u64 in #[napi(object)] field positions (JS numbers are f64), so the binding casts to i64 — same precedent as CounterSnapshot fields (u64 → i64). Surface type on TS side is `number | null` (durationMs).
implementation_notes.rust_workspace_deps_added: src/rust/crates/fathomdb-napi/Cargo.toml gained fathomdb-embedder-api.workspace = true and fathomdb-schema.workspace = true to import RustEmbedderIdentity and RustMigrationStepReport — same pattern as fathomdb-py's Cargo.toml.
implementation_notes.spec_doc_edits: dev/interfaces/typescript.md L27-37: 0.6.0 caveat block removed; the 'returns the engine handle plus the structured open report' line rewritten to point at the accessor. engine.openReport() added to the Engine-attached instrumentation list (L51-58). dev/notes/12-TX-parity-matrix.md § 1 row 2 flipped from ⚠️ (py landed; ts pending) to ✅ (both bindings).
